name: Rahul S.
text: Clean rooms, friendly owner, and uninterrupted power backup. The Wi-Fi is genuinely fast for work and studies.

name: Ananya P.
text: Loved the location (Kaakdeo). The washroom and kitchen setup was hygienic. Great security with CCTV.

name: Vivek K.
text: Good ambience, safe neighbourhood, and prompt maintenance. The water purifier is a big plus.
